- **`CFG.vw_Choice_Sync_Summary`** — ChoiceField, TotalValues, ActiveValues, NewCount, ChangedCount, RemovedCount, LastSyncedAt, LastSyncExecutionID

- **`CFG.vw_Commodity_Code_Changes`** — CommodityCode, Description, ChangeStatus, IsActive, EffectiveFrom, EffectiveTo, FirstSeenAt, LastSyncedAt, LastSyncExecutionID
- **`PRS.vw_BKD_ENS_Header_Reasons`** — ClientCode, MovementKey, ExecutionID, Reason
- **`PRS.vw_BKD_ENS_Header_Rejected`** — ClientCode, MovementKey, Fusion_Status, Fusion_Status_Reason, op_type, movement_type, arrival_port, arrival_date_time, transport_charges, carrier_eori, carrier_name, ExecutionID, SubmissionID, CreatedAt, SourceEnsLoadID, SourceFile, StagedAt, ValidatedAt
- **`PRS.vw_BKD_ENS_Header_Status`** — ClientCode, MovementKey, Fusion_Status, Fusion_Status_Reason, op_type, movement_type, arrival_port, arrival_date_time, transport_charges, carrier_eori, carrier_name, ExecutionID, SubmissionID, CreatedAt, SourceEnsLoadID, SourceFile, StagedAt, ValidatedAt
- **`SRV.vw_Processing_Errors`** — ClientCode, ExecutionID, ModuleName, ProcessName, ExecutionStatus, StartedAt, StepName, ErrorType, Message, TransactionID, LoggedAt
- **`sys.database_firewall_rules`** — id, name, start_ip_address, end_ip_address, create_date, modify_date
